Author's Notes—

YAP ZONE—

RAHH I can't believe I never thought of this, I watched 'You' over the summer and didn't even obsess for more than a few months. YET I OBSESS OVER BSD FOR ALMOST A YEAR?? Actually wild that this is my life choice. I think this will be fun though, please enjoy this...tell me if I shouldn't do it lmao
